CustomerDetail.description: Full identity-graph payload for /customers/:id detail page.
CustomerDetail.title: CustomerDetail

FeishuContactUserOut.description:
One user under a department in the org-tree browser, annotated with
sync status so the UI can grey-out already-synced rows.
FeishuContactUserOut.title: FeishuContactUserOut

FeishuDeptOut.description: One department node in the org-tree browser.
FeishuDeptOut.title: FeishuDeptOut

HistoryEvent.description:
One row in the merged ticket timeline.

Two `kind` values are emitted:
  - 'status'        — a status_history transition (from→to)
  - 'hub_issue_link' — a ticket_hub_issue_history row (effective_from start
                       of an association; effective_to non-null = closed)

Sorted by `occurred_at` ascending in the response (oldest → newest); the
frontend reverses for display.
HistoryEvent.title: HistoryEvent

IngestResponse.description: Used by zhichi / zammad webhooks (synchronous response shape).
IngestResponse.title: IngestResponse

KSMAck.description:
KSM expects {"code": 0} as the ack — anything else is treated as a
delivery failure and KSM will retry.
KSMAck.title: KSMAck

ProductLinePatch.description:
PATCH body for /api/admin/product-lines/{code}.

NULL on SLA fields clears the override (falls back to SLAWatcher
defaults). Pass `0` is rejected — use `null` to clear.
ProductLinePatch.title: ProductLinePatch

SyncFromFeishuIn.description: Either pull a whole department or a specific list of open_ids.
SyncFromFeishuIn.title: SyncFromFeishuIn

schema.title: Response List Features Api Admin Features Get
Response List Holidays Api Admin Holidays Get
Response List Modules Api Admin Modules Get
Response List Product Lines Api Admin Product Lines Get

post.description: Create a new product_line. UNIQUE on `code` → 409 on duplicate.

delete.description:
Hard delete. Refuses if the product_line still has modules registered
(catalog FK) — admin must clean up first to prevent orphaned scopes /
tickets pointing at a vanished product_line.

patch.description:
Update SLA overrides (and is_active) for a product line.

Send `null` to a field to clear the override (revert to SLAWatcher
builtin default).

schema.title: Response List Features Api Admin Scopes Features Get
Response List History Api Admin Scopes History Get
Response List Modules Api Admin Scopes Modules Get
Response List Skills Api Admin Skills Get
Response Get History Api Admin Skills  Name  History Get
Response List Sources Api Admin Sources Get
Response List Users Api Admin Users Get

get.description: List immediate child departments of `parent_id` (default: root='0').

schema.title: Response List Feishu Departments Api Admin Users Feishu Departments Get

get.description:
Return all departments under root as a flat list with parent_department_id.

Uses fetch_child=True so Feishu returns the full hierarchy in one call.
Frontend builds the tree from parent_department_id relationships.

schema.title: Response List Feishu Departments Tree Api Admin Users Feishu Departments Tree Get

get.description: List users directly under a Feishu department, annotated with sync status.

schema.title: Response List Feishu Department Users Api Admin Users Feishu Departments  Department Id  Users Get

post.description: Bulk-pull users from Feishu contact API and upsert into local users.

Match local users to Linear members by @email and populate
linear_user_id / linear_team_id (for per-assignee Linear push routing).

schema.title: Response Add Partner Api Admin Users  User Id  Partners Post

get.description:
Exchange Feishu auth code for our JWT and redirect browser to frontend.

Browser arrives here as a GET (Feishu's standard OAuth2 redirect). We
exchange the code, sign a JWT, and 302 to the frontend SPA with token
in URL fragment (so the token never reaches our server logs).

Side effect: upserts users row (creates on first login).
Return the Feishu OAuth2 authorize URL.

schema.title: Response Search Customers Api Customers Search Get

post.description:
Author/replace the Operation reply. Cascades to linked tickets'
cached_reply and enqueues sync_outbox rows for source write-back.

Ask the customer for more info (补料). Enqueues a supply sync_outbox row
per linked sourced ticket; the KSM sender drains them into supplyKsmOrder.

Publish a skill draft to production. If ticket_id is given, record a
knowledge-revision audit row on that escalation ticket.

Re-answer a question with the current or a draft skill + latest
knowledge — the reflect/test button. Pass skill_draft_version to test an
unpublished draft without touching production.

schema.title: Response Ai Cs List Skills Endpoint Api Supervisor Ai Cs Skills Get

post.description:
Create a skill draft off the current published version. Empty files
inherits published; non-empty upserts. Draft is NOT live until published.

get.description:
Whether the knowledge-feedback feature is on + configured — the UI hides
the reflect panel when off.

post.description:
Graduate a ticket to a hub_issue (manual path, no confidence gate).

Bug_fix/Demand issues are pushed to Linear asynchronously when
LINEAR_PUSH_ENABLED is on (the push itself re-checks all gates).

get.description: Pending dedup_link proposals awaiting supervisor action.

post.description:
Manually run one KSM outbox drain pass. Respects ksm_writeback_enabled /
_dry_run — a supervisor uses this to flush pending回写 on demand and see the
outcome, rather than waiting for the 2-min beat.
Merge the duplicate ticket onto the original's hub_issue.

Materialize a pending split_ticket proposal into Child tickets.

Children are classified asynchronously after the response (LLM call —
must not block the supervisor's request).

get.description: hub_issues whose Linear push is blocked (status='pending') + why.

post.description:
Retry a blocked Linear push (e.g. after the assignee joined Linear and
sync-from-linear refreshed the mapping). Synchronous — the supervisor
wants to see the outcome immediately.

Undo a materialized split: soft-delete children (refused if any child
is already in progress), restore the parent to Raw.

get.description:
Pending split_ticket proposals awaiting supervisor action (execute or
dismiss). Materialized and reverted proposals are excluded.

The golden triple (原问题/AI答复/不满) for an ai_cs escalation ticket, so
the reflect UI can seed the comparison. is_escalation=false for non-ai_cs
tickets (UI hides the panel).

post.description:
AI 客服「会话失败/转人工」实时回调 → 建 ai_cs 工单 → escalation 链
（vision → 黄金三元组二次分类 → dedup/conflict）。

KSM webhook receiver.

Two payload modes (the endpoint accepts both, KSM only sends the first):

1. **Lightweight ping** (production KSM contract per doc § 二):
   `{billId|id, noticeNum, subscribeNum}` → store latest pair → schedule
   BackgroundTask to call subscribeCallback and ingest → return
   `{"code": 0}` immediately.

2. **Full payload** (legacy / tests / xlsx replay):
   caller already provides title/content/productLineCode/...; ingest
   synchronously and still return `{"code": 0}` (KSM contract).

Per doc: 校验三个字段均不为空，否则忽略（log warning + 200）—
important so KSM doesn't retry malformed pushes.
